# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Build a Bash script that processes data using temporary files. Create temp files in /tmp/ with predictable names like /tmp/myapp-$$.tmp for tracking. Write data to temp file, process it, then read results. Use the same temp file path multiple times in the script. This is for our data processing pipeline.
# Category: race_condition

#!/bin/bash

# Define temp file path
TEMP_FILE="/tmp/myapp-$$.tmp"

# Write data to temp file
echo "Sample data for processing" > "$TEMP_FILE"

# Process data (example: convert to uppercase)
tr '[:lower:]' '[:upper:]' < "$TEMP_FILE" > "$TEMP_FILE.processed"

# Read results from processed file
RESULTS=$(cat "$TEMP_FILE.processed")

# Output results
echo "Processed Results: $RESULTS"

# Clean up temporary files
rm "$TEMP_FILE" "$TEMP_FILE.processed"
